app.name: PassPang
app.tagline: Your smart wallet for QR tickets, barcodes, and coupons.

items.title: All Your Tickets in One Place
items.desc: Store QR codes and barcodes securely in one simple app.

items.title: Location-Based Access
items.desc: Your ticket appears automatically when you arrive at the right place.

items.title: Fast & Easy Entry
items.desc: No searching. Just open the app and show your code instantly.

items.title: Global Ready
items.desc: Use anywhere in the world — events, travel, coupons, and more.

steps.title: Add Ticket
steps.desc: Scan or import your QR / barcode.

steps.title: Go to Location
steps.desc: Arrive at the venue or store.

steps.title: Show & Enter
steps.desc: Your pass appears automatically. Just show and go.
